title: K-diff Pairs in an Array
titleCn: 数组中的 k-diff 数对

testcases.input: nums = [3,1,4,1,5], k = 2 Output: 2 Explanation: There are two 2-diff pairs in the array, (1, 3) and (3, 5). Although we have two 1s in the input, we should only return the number of unique pairs.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: There are two 2-diff pairs in the array, (1, 3) and (3, 5). Although we have two 1s in the input, we should only return the number of unique pairs.

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4,5], k = 1 Output: 4 Explanation: There are four 1-diff pairs in the array, (1, 2), (2, 3), (3, 4) and (4, 5).
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: There are four 1-diff pairs in the array, (1, 2), (2, 3), (3, 4) and (4, 5).

testcases.input: nums = [1,3,1,5,4], k = 0 Output: 1 Explanation: There is one 0-diff pair in the array, (1, 1).
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: There is one 0-diff pair in the array, (1, 1).
